figures.caption: Figure 3: Results of the RL upon various OLMO-2 pretraining checkpoints. The left image shows the consistency of the achieved gains via RL using a different number of GRPO steps. The right image shows the behavior of the different components of our study.

Figure 5: Z-scores of the gain after RL vs. z-scores of the predicted RL impact. Correlation (left) and curve per checkpoint (right). The std bars on left indicate RL gain variance over the various training steps.
